title: Snap atoms into molecules — every gray stick is a shared pair of electrons (a bond)
todo: Finish bonds_needed(outer, wants) to connect the atoms with the right number of sticks.

stages.label: Water
stages.caption: 💧 Water! One oxygen (red) sharing a single bond with each hydrogen (white).

stages.label: Oxygen
stages.caption: 🌬️ The oxygen you breathe — two O's holding on with a strong DOUBLE bond.

stages.label: Carbon dioxide
stages.caption: 🫧 Carbon dioxide — the fizz in soda! Carbon (black) double-bonded to two oxygens.
